t_ch: 从前面走到宣夜大道，再沿着道路右边一直往前走，路上会看到一个说评书的人在演出。那里就是不夜侯了。
t_en: Go straight until Starwatcher Avenue, keep to the right, and you'll see a storyteller performing on your way. That's where the Sleepless Earl is.

t_ch: 谢谢小哥！真是不好意思…我这是第一次来到别的文明世界……
t_en: Thanks, little bro! Really sorry for the trouble... It's my first time visiting another civilization...

t_ch: 远渡异乡，有些不适应是正常不过的事。有需要帮忙的尽管开口。对了，你从哪儿来呀？
t_en: It's normal to feel a little uncomfortable when you're so far from home. If you need any help, just ask. So where are you from?

t_ch: 我来自贝洛伯格。我们最近才和银河重新建立联系，小哥你可能没听说过。
t_en: I'm from Belobog. We've only recently re-established connections with the cosmos, so you might not have heard of it.

t_ch: 贝洛伯格！我听人说起过…难怪你这个铁臂看起来如此威风，老师也是来参加演武仪典的吧？
t_en: Belobog! I've heard of it from others... No wonder your metal arm looks so awesome. Master, you must be here to compete in the Wardance, right?

t_ch: 老师？可不敢当，我叫卢卡，是专程来参加演武仪典的，希望能成功挑战罗浮仙舟的守擂剑士，扬名立万，好让所有人都知道贝洛伯格的名字！
t_en: Master? You flatter me. My name is Luka. I'm here to compete in the Wardance. I hope to make a name for myself by successfully challenging the ringmaster of the Xianzhou Luofu so that everyone will know the name "Belobog"!

t_ch: 你…要挑战罗浮的守擂剑士？你要挑战…彦卿？这么看起来，咱们还挺有缘。
t_en: You... want to challenge the ringmaster of the Luofu? You want to challenge... Yanqing? It seems like our stars are aligned.

t_ch: 你…不会也是参加演武仪典的选手吧？你也是来挑战那位叫彦卿的选手吗？
t_en: You're... also here to compete in the Wardance? Are you also here to challenge the one named Yanqing?

t_ch: 算是吧，作为武者，总要不断挑战自我嘛。
t_en: I guess, as a warrior, I always have to keep challenging myself.

t_ch: 嗯，我同意！战士就是要不断挑战自己，挑战强敌。如果止步不前，被眼前的强敌吓住了，那过去的每一次战斗也就失去了意义。
t_en: Yeah, I agree! Warriors have to keep challenging themselves and strong enemies. If you stop moving forward and get scared by the enemy in front of you, all past battles become meaningless.

t_ch: 能代表罗浮仙舟守擂…彦卿想必是个身手了得的战士吧？这么一想，心里还真有些没底啊！
t_en: To be able to represent the Xianzhou Luofu... This Yanqing must truly be a legendary fighter. I'm not feeling so sure of myself now that I think about it.

t_ch: 我站上擂台时，心里和你一样，虽说对自己苦练多年的技艺抱有信心，但说到底，我也不知自己面对的对手到底会有怎样的实力，内心也怀着恐惧。
t_en: I feel the same as you whenever I stand in the ring. Although I am confident in the skills that I've honed over the years through my hard work, honestly speaking, there's always that nagging uncertainty about how good my opponents might be. It's like fear sneaks in and messes with my confidence.

t_ch: 哈哈，我倒是有一个诀窍，能帮你在赛前克服恐惧——
t_en: Haha, I've got a little trick that can help you conquer your pre-match anxiety—

t_ch: 找个空旷无人的地方，把对手的名字大声喊出来，直到发自内心地相信，自己能打赢那个让你恐惧的强敌为止。
t_en: Find an empty place and scream the name of your opponent until you truly believe that you can beat the enemy you fear.

t_ch: 哈哈，真是个有趣的法子，好，就这么办！
t_en: Haha, what an interesting trick! Okay, I'll give it a go!

t_ch: 我！一定会赢的！最后站在擂台之上的，一定是我！
t_en: I, will be victorious! The last one standing in that ring can only be me!

t_ch: 我！卢卡！一定会赢的！我一定会打败彦卿的！
t_en: I! Luka! Will definitely win! I will defeat Yanqing!

t_ch: 哈…哈哈哈哈哈！
t_en: Ha... Hahahaha!

t_ch: 来，小哥，你也喊两嗓子～咱们给自己鼓鼓劲！
t_en: Come on, lemme hear you shout — Let's pump ourselves up!

t_ch: 啊？我也要吗？
t_en: Ah? Me too?

t_ch: 来，跟我一起喊！
t_en: Come, shout with me!

t_ch: 我一定可以打败彦卿！
t_en: I WILL DEFEAT YANQING!

t_ch: 我一定可以打败彦卿！
t_en: I WILL DEFEAT YANQING!

t_ch: 彦卿绝对不是我的对手！
t_en: YANQING WON'T DEFEAT ME!

t_ch: 彦卿绝对不是我的对手！
t_en: YANQING WON'T DEFEAT ME!

t_ch: 哈哈哈哈哈哈哈哈。
t_en: Yeah! Hahahahahahaha.

t_ch: 你说的对，喊了这么几嗓子，我心里自信多了。
t_en: Hey, you're right! All that shouting made me feel much more confident.

t_ch: 没骗你吧！虽然我没见过什么世面，但关于战斗，我有不少丰富的经验，希望可以帮到你！
t_en: See? I wasn't lying! Although I haven't seen much of the world, I do have a lot of experience fighting. I hope this helps!

t_ch: 谢谢你，卢卡。时候不早了，我该去为擂赛做准备了。
t_en: Thank you, Luka. It's late. I have to go prepare for my match.

t_ch: 兄弟，你还没告诉我你的名字呢？
t_en: My friend, you haven't told me your name.

t_ch: …你就叫我冷锋吧。在仙舟语中意为「寒冷的剑」。有缘再见了，卢卡。
t_en: ...You can call me Lengfeng. In the Xianzhou language it means an icy blade. May fate bring us together again, Luka.

t_ch: …冷锋，真是个有着冷酷名字的好人啊。
t_en: ...Lengfeng, now that's a really cool name, for such a cool person!

t_ch: 哈哈哈哈哈哈哈哈。
t_en: Hahahahahahaha.

t_ch: 哈哈哈哈哈哈哈哈。
t_en: Hahahahahahaha.

t_ch: 数周前，贝洛伯格，磐岩镇。
t_en: Several weeks ago, Boulder Town, Belobog

t_ch: 娜塔莎大姐头…我，还剩下多长时间？
t_en: Nat... I... How long do I have left?

t_ch: 不多了，做好心理准备，卢卡。
t_en: Not long, Luka. Best brace yourself.

t_ch: 那，我还有什么能做的吗？
t_en: Is... Is there anything else I can do?

t_ch: 都到这个份上了…想吃点什么就吃点什么吧。
t_en: You're already at this stage... Just eat whatever you like.

t_ch: 那怎么行！在这种紧要关头乱吃东西，体脂率不就完蛋了吗！
t_en: That won't do! I can't be gorging on garbage at this pivotal moment. It'll ruin my energy levels!

t_ch: 我明白，你现在迫不及待想去参加贝城代表预选赛的决赛。不过，杰帕德可不好对付。
t_en: I know. You can't wait to join the finals of the Belobog Representative Qualifiers. But Gepard isn't a pushover either.

t_ch: 我可是仔细研究过杰帕德先生的招式的！
t_en: I've been hard at work studying how Mr. Gepard moves!

t_ch: 大姐头，你就等着瞧吧，我一定会战胜杰帕德先生，成为咱们贝洛伯格七百年来第一个有资格去星空中打比赛的格斗家！
t_en: Just wait and see. I'll defeat Mr. Gepard and be the first Belobog fighter in seven hundred years to qualify for a competition in space!

t_ch: 两周后，竞技场。
t_en: Two weeks later at the arena

t_ch: 接下来，在大守护者与贝洛伯格民众的见证下，我们将迎来一场历史性的对决。银鬃铁卫戍卫官杰帕德•朗道将应战「熔锤的勇士」铁臂卢卡。
t_en: Next up, with the Supreme Guardian and Belobog's people as witnesses, let us now unveil the curtains to a historical final: Silvermane Captain Gepard Landau will face off against the "The Moltammerville Warrior" — Luka "Strongarm"!

t_ch: 有请比赛双方入场！
t_en: Both contenders, step onto the stage please!

t_ch: 卢卡，你一直有个坏习惯，喜欢硬吃人一招然后找破绽。但杰帕德力量比你大太多了，记住喽，不要硬扛他的拳头。
t_en: Luka, you've always had this bad habit of taking a hit to exploit a weakness, but Gepard's much stronger than you, so remember, stay away from his punches.

t_ch: 师父，你都说一路了，我耳朵都听出茧子了。
t_en: Master, you've been telling me that the entire trip. My ears are about to fall off...

t_ch: 行了，我不唠叨了…你也别把胜负看得太重了。你能打进决赛和杰帕德对一局，就算去不成那个「咸粥萝卜」也够光荣了！
t_en: Fine, enough prattle... But don't let the need to win weigh too heavily on you either. Even if you don't make it to that Sianjo Lowfoo, you've made it to the final to fight against Gepard, that's enough to make anyone proud!

t_ch: 那可不行！卢卡哥哥答应虎克了，要赢得决赛，把虎克也带上，去外面的世界看看！
t_en: That won't do! Luka promised Hook that he has to win the final and take Hook up there to see the stars beyond!

t_ch: 小东西想得还真美。
t_en: Ya sure got some daydreams on ya, little one.

t_ch: 放心吧，奥列格师父、漆黑的虎克大人，我一定会赢的。
t_en: Don't worry. Master Oleg and Pitch-Dark Hook the Great, I'll win this for sure.

t_ch: 卢卡哥哥，绝对不可以输哦！你说好要带虎克去「咸粥萝卜」上面玩的！
t_en: Luka, you absolutely cannot lose! You promised to take me up to visit the Sianjo Lowfoo!

t_ch: 你小子，不要随便承诺小孩子啊…没事，输了就让他去当铺把铁臂当掉，自掏腰包带你去。
t_en: Kid, you've really gotta stop making promises to children... Never mind. He'll just pawn his iron arm if he loses, and take you up there out of his own pocket.

t_ch: 杰帕德先生，我一直都很期待与你交手。整个上层区，应该没有人比你更值得我挑战了。
t_en: Mr. Gepard, I've always been hoping to fight you. There's no one in the Overworld more worth challenging than you.

t_ch: 很荣幸。我也一直很想看看，传说中的「铁臂卢卡」到底有多厉害。
t_en: I'm honored. I've also been raring to witness the strength of the legendary Luka "Strongarm."

t_ch: 我不是很擅长聊天，不过好在咱们都是战士，不必用语言交心。
t_en: I'm not great at conversation, so it's a good thing we're both warriors — we don't have to use words to understand each other.

t_ch: 说的没错。卢卡，就把你渴望胜利的决心，用拳头告诉我吧！
t_en: Well said, Luka. Let your determined desire for victory speak through your fists!

t_ch: 我输了…杰帕德先生，是您技高一筹。
t_en: I've lost... Mr. Gepard, you were better than me.

t_ch: 卢卡，无论技术还是力量你都无可挑剔。但你，太在意胜负了。这反而让你没办法发挥全力。
t_en: Luka, there wasn't ever any doubt in your technique and strength. But you were too concerned with winning, and that prevented you from unleashing your utmost.

t_ch: 可是如果不关心胜负，我站在这里做什么？
t_en: ...Uh, then what am I doing here, if not to attain victory?

t_ch: 这就是你要自己想明白的问题了。
t_en: That's a question you need to ask yourself.

t_ch: 从我个人的经验来讲…人内心的声音特别嘈杂，在安全舒适的地方尤其如此。有些你心中极为重要的声音，反而只有在那些痛苦、不安、危险的时候才能被你听清楚。
t_en: From my experience... a person's inner voices make far too much noise, especially so during safe and quiet moments. Ironically, the voices that truly matter often become audible only in moments of pain, discomfort, and peril.

t_ch: 所以也许等你离开熟悉的家乡，去往陌生的「罗浮」以后，就会明白答案了。
t_en: When perhaps you leave your cozy hometown and head to the unfamiliar Luofu, you will find your answer.

t_ch: 等等，我到「罗浮」以后？赢了的人是你啊？
t_en: Hold on. When I reach the Luofu? But you won?

t_ch: 和你说实话吧，我不可能抛下手头的工作离开贝洛伯格。
t_en: Truth be told, I can't just drop my work and leave Belobog.

t_ch: 我这次来，是为了确认你在这场比武盛会中是否有实力去面对来自不同世界的选手。而现在，我认可你的实力。
t_en: My reason for coming to this martial tournament was to verify if you were good enough to contend against competitors from other worlds. And now I see you're good enough.

t_ch: 你比我年轻，比我阳光，也比我更能代表贝洛伯格的形象——别忘了，我们参加演武仪典，也是为了向银河各方宣传雅利洛-Ⅵ。
t_en: You're younger and more upbeat than I am, a far more appropriate image for Belobog. Don't forget that the reason we're participating in the Wardance is also to promote Jarilo-VI to the rest of the cosmos.

t_ch: 卢卡，我将前往仙舟「罗浮」参加演武仪典的机会交给你。
t_en: Luka, I'm entrusting the chance of attending the Wardance on the Xianzhou Luofu to you.

t_ch: 杰帕德先生，请不要施舍我。机会要靠自己用实力堂堂正正地赢来！
t_en: Mr. Gepard, please don't pity me. Chances must be earned fairly through our own strength!

t_ch: 你误会了，卢卡，这不是「施舍」。这场胜利是我借给你的，你要用演武仪典上的胜利来还给我。
t_en: You are mistaken, Luka. It's not pity. I am lending you this victory, and you will repay me by winning the Wardance.

t_ch: 我宣布，有资格代表贝洛伯格，前往「仙舟联盟•罗浮」参加演武仪典的选手是——卢卡！
t_en: I hereby announce that the contender who has earned the right to represent Belobog in the Wardance is — Luka!

t_ch: *欢呼声*
t_en: Luka! Luka! Belobog! Belobog!

t_ch: 我明白了，杰帕德先生。
t_en: Understood, Mr. Gepard.

t_ch: 别难受了，走吧，我们该去克里珀堡和大守护者见面了。
t_en: Chin up. Let's go. We should head to Qlipoth Fort and meet with the Supreme Guardian.

t_ch: 你好，卢卡。
t_en: Hello, Luka.

t_ch: 布洛妮娅大人…您好？不好意思，我是在下层区长大的，不懂什么礼仪……
t_en: Lady Bronya... Hi? Sorry, I grew up in the Underworld, so I'm not versed in etiquette of any sort...

t_ch: 不必拘礼。我想，对于你要去的「罗浮」，你一定还一无所知吧？趁这个机会，我们可以聊聊。
t_en: No need for formalities. You probably know nothing about the Luofu, the place you're heading to, correct? Let us take this opportunity to discuss it.

t_ch: 我一直有些好奇…虽然雅利洛-Ⅵ恢复了和外界的联系，但咱们一直都是和公司打交道，为什么突然要去参加这个叫「罗浮」的地方的格斗大赛？
t_en: I've always been a little curious... Though Jarilo-VI has restored contact with the outside worlds, we've always just been communicating with the IPC. Why are we suddenly participating in this fighters' tournament in this Luofu place?

t_ch: 前不久，贝洛伯格的星际通讯基站恢复了运作。在一个月前，我们收到了一封讯号失真有些严重的「邀请函」——
t_en: Not long ago, Belobog's interstellar comms base resumed operations. A month ago, we received an invitation with a highly distorted signal...

t_ch: 「仙舟『罗浮』诚邀雅利洛-Ⅵ的战士们莅临，参加演武仪典。」
t_en: "The Xianzhou Luofu cordially invites Jarilo-VI's warriors to join the Wardance."

t_ch: 我们才刚恢复对外联系，按公司的说法，银河早就忘了咱们。为什么仙舟在第一时间向咱们这样默默无闻的地方发来信函？
t_en: We've just resumed outside contact, and the way the IPC describes it, the cosmos has long forgotten us. Why would the Xianzhou so eagerly send an invitation to a city that has been buried in time?

t_ch: 我猜，是因为在寒潮降临前，我们与很多世界有过联系。卢卡，你听说过「伊戈尔•哈夫特」的故事吗？
t_en: My guess is that it's because we had communications with many worlds before the Eternal Freeze. Luka, have you heard of the story of Igor Haft?

t_ch: 你是说那位传奇战士？我当然知道！他率领第八铁军与{RUBY_B#反物质军团}天外的入侵者们{RUBY_E#}奋勇战斗的故事我从来听不厌！
t_en: You mean the legendary warrior? 'Course I have! I'll never tire of the story where he led the Eighth Iron Legion and engaged in a furious battle against {RUBY_B#Antimatter Legion}the invaders from beyond the sky{RUBY_E#}!

t_ch: 就是他。趁着寒潮消退，玲宝…咳咳，玲可一直在探索古代城市「马斯列尼察」的遗址。几个月前，她在那儿找到了一座独立于公共墓园之外的坟墓。
t_en: That's him. When the Eternal Freeze subsided, Lynxy... Ahem, Lynx took the opportunity to explore the ruins of the ancient city of Maslenitsa. A few months ago, she found a lone grave outside the public graveyard.

t_ch: 坟墓中没有遗体，只有一条机械臂和一块破损的宝石挂坠。公司的人说，那条机械臂是旧世界时代的科技了，至于宝石，则是一种被称为玉兆的仙舟器物。
t_en: The grave had no body, just a robot arm and a cracked pendant with an embedded gemstone. An IPC worker said that the arm was tech from the Old World. As for the stone, it's a Xianzhou implement called a jade abacus.

t_ch: 我听说了！玲可小姐认为那是伊戈尔的衣冠冢！
t_en: I've heard about that! Miss Lynx thinks it's Igor's grave!

t_ch: 没错。墓志铭的生平里明确了，拳击手伊戈尔•哈夫特曾在军团入侵前离开过雅利洛-Ⅵ，但后来他回到了家园，参加抵抗军团入侵的战争。
t_en: That's right. The epitaph on the tombstone confirms that hypothesis — the fighter Igor Haft once left Jarilo-VI before the invasion, and then he returned home to join the resistance against the aggressors.

t_ch: 没有人知道他离开雅利洛-Ⅵ之后去做了什么，又为什么会选择回来。
t_en: No one knows what he did after he left Jarilo-VI, and why he decided to come back.

t_ch: …也许伊戈尔抵达过仙舟？所以他们才给咱发了邀请函？
t_en: ...Maybe Igor had been to the Xianzhou? That's why they sent us an invitation?

t_ch: 伊戈尔甚至有可能参加过演武仪典。仙舟人的寿命很长，那对他们而言并不算太久以前的事。
t_en: Maybe Igor even attended the Wardance. The Xianzhou people have long lives, so it wouldn't be something that happened long ago for them.

t_ch: 长话短说。无论仙舟联盟为何邀请我们，参加这次「演武仪典」，都对贝洛伯格意义重大。
t_en: Long story short, regardless of why the Xianzhou Alliance invited us, joining this Wardance is of august meaning to Belobog.

t_ch: 它蕴含着一个机会，让整个银河再一次认识我们——一个从军团与寒潮中坚强幸存的英雄国度。
t_en: It symbolizes a chance to introduce ourselves to the cosmos once again — a heroic kingdom that survived both the Legion and the Eternal Freeze with tenacity.

t_ch: 另外，如果能借此机会与仙舟联盟建立简单的往来，也可以让我们在面对公司时多一些筹码。
t_en: Also, if we can leverage this opportunity to establish an amicable exchange with the Xianzhou Alliance, it may provide us with more bargaining power when dealing with the IPC.

t_ch: 布洛妮娅大人，我没怎么上过学，不太懂这些伟大的事情……
t_en: Lady Bronya, I'm not well-educated, so I don't really know such matters of grandiosity...

t_ch: 我只明白，我要为贝洛伯格赢得荣誉！
t_en: All I know is that I must achieve glory for Belobog!

t_ch: 说得好！差点忘了！希儿今天有事，没办法参加这次会面，但她托我给你留了个言，咳咳——
t_en: Well said! Oh, I almost forgot! Seele had other matters today, and couldn't attend today's meeting. But she entrusted me to deliver a message, ahem...

t_ch: 「杰帕德那家伙在搞什么鬼？卢卡你给我好好打，要是输了，我就狠狠揍你！」
t_en: "What's that dolt Gepard up to now? Luka, you'd better fight like your life is on the line! If you lose, I'll make sure you wish you were really dead!"

t_ch: 第二天，我搭乘着星际和平公司的运输舰来到了罗浮仙舟。
t_en: The next day, I hitched a ride with an IPC transport vessel and arrived on the Xianzhou Luofu.

t_ch: 大守护者希望年轻一代能见见世面，于是安排玲可与虎克跟我一起旅行。考虑到咱们仨都不知怎么和银河文明打交道，她甚至指示史瓦罗大佬作为我们的知识向导跟来了。
t_en: The Supreme Guardian hopes that the younger generation can go out and see other worlds, so she arranged for Lynx and Hook to accompany me. On account of the fact that the three of us know next to nothing about interacting with other cosmic civilizations, she even instructed Svarog to tag along and be our guide.

t_ch: 没想到，在天舶司办理入境手续的时候，我们又遇到了意料之外的情况……
t_en: I never thought that, while we were processing our entry papers at the Sky-Faring Commission, we would run into another surprise...

t_ch: 我们仔细核对过了。这封通讯邀请函它确实来自罗浮，但比对了一下它的印戳……
t_en: We've double-checked. This invitation did indeed come from the Luofu, but after checking the stamp...

t_ch: …这已经是四百多年前的邀请函了。
t_en: ...This invitation was dated four hundred years ago.

t_ch: 四百年前？！这怎么可能？这封邀请函，分明是我们不久前刚收到的啊……
t_en: Four hundred years ago!? How is that possible? We just received this invite not too long ago...

t_ch: 暂时假定结果为——这封邀请函在传输过程中被积压延迟，近期恢复通讯后才成功送达我们手中。
t_en: We can assume that this invite was delayed in transmission and only reached us after the restoration of communications.

t_ch: 恐怕这位金人先生是对的，你们收到了一封迟到四百年的邀请函。
t_en: I'm afraid this aurumaton is right. You received an invitation that is four hundred years late.

t_ch: 原来我们没被邀请啊？完了，这下白跑一趟了。该怎么和布洛妮娅大人和杰帕德先生解释呢？他们可是对我寄予厚望……
t_en: So... We weren't invited? Oh no, this trip has all been for nothing then. How am I going to explain this to Lady Bronya and Mr. Gepard? They have high hopes for me...

t_ch: 根据计算，我们首先应当考虑的问题并非情绪，而是——
t_en: According to calculations, the thing that we should be considering first is not emotions, but...

t_ch: 如果我们并非受邀贵宾，那么则需要自行负担滞留当地产生的一切费用。计算结果——我们负担不起。
t_en: If we are not invited guests, then we will be responsible for all costs incurred while staying here. Conclusion: We cannot afford it.

t_ch: 几位误会了！罗浮仙舟的确正在进行名为「演武仪典」的比武庆典。
t_en: You all misunderstand! The Xianzhou Luofu is indeed hosting a martial arts competition called the Wardance.

t_ch: 无论是否收到邀请函，只要想报名参赛，都能参加演武仪典的比试。唯一的区别是，受邀贵宾在通过测试后能参与最隆重的「竞锋守擂」，挑战罗浮仙舟的守擂剑士。
t_en: Whether you receive an invitation or not, anyone who wants to can register to compete in the Wardance. The sole distinction is that invited guests, upon qualifying through a test, get to partake in the prestigious "Ringmaster's Challenge," facing off against the Xianzhou Luofu's ringmaster.

t_ch: 而普通参赛者，则需要参加叩关赛，不断过关斩将，才能抵达「竞锋守擂」的擂台。
t_en: As for ordinary contestants, they will have to participate in knockout stages and rise through the ranks to reach the ultimate stage of the "Ringmaster's Challenge."

t_ch: 罗浮的守擂剑士，也就是参赛选手要挑战的终极目标？
t_en: To challenge the Luofu's ringmaster, that's the ultimate goal for all the contestants?

t_ch: 没错。虽然您没有邀请函，但同样可以参加演武仪典，也有机会赢得胜利和荣誉。
t_en: That's right. Although you didn't receive an invitation, you can still participate in the Wardance. You'll definitely have a chance to win and gain honor.

t_ch: 但是，史瓦罗先生说得有道理——根据计算，我们没钱。
t_en: But, Mr. Svarog has a point — according to calculations, we can't afford this.

t_ch: 哈哈，有钱难买真交情！几位手上这封「迟到四百年的邀请函」想必是一桩奇妙的因缘。各位有缘来到罗浮，我们可不能失了礼数。
t_en: Haha, money can't buy relationships! This invitation that's been delayed for four hundred years must be a marvelous twist of fate. And since fate has brought you all here to the Luofu, we will not fail in our hospitality.

t_ch: 我会上报，以受邀贵宾的标准，为贝洛伯格的代表队安排食宿，请放心。
t_en: Please be assured that I will report this incident and ensure that the Belobog representative team receives the same accommodation and treatment as all other esteemed invited guests!

t_ch: 不过，卢卡先生还是要从叩关赛开始，一步步冲击最后的擂台。
t_en: However, Mr. Luka, you will still have to participate in all the knockout stages and work your way up to the final stage.

t_ch: 真的吗？让您破费了！
t_en: Really? At your expense?

t_ch: 「演武仪典」是为了彰显武德，以武会友。朋友来了，岂有让他们发愁食宿的道理。
t_en: The heart of the Wardance is all about celebrating martial arts and fostering friendships. My friends, how could we possibly allow you to fret over food and lodging?

t_ch: 谢谢你，夕葵小姐！我会珍惜这个机会的！
t_en: Thank you, Miss Xikui! I'll treasure this opportunity!

t_ch: 就这样，在夕葵小姐的善意之下，我总算没有出师未捷身先死——这句仙舟古话是这几天刚学会的——成功登记成为了演武仪典的参赛选手。
t_en: And just like that, by the grace of Miss Xikui, I didn't "die before achieving success" — I just learned this old Xianzhou saying a few days ago. I've successfully become a competing fighter in the Wardance!

t_ch: 卢卡选手，接下来这场比赛的对手，波提欧…你可一定要小心。这是个极度狂躁的危险分子！
t_en: Luka, your next opponent is Boothill... You have to be careful. He's a dangerous maniac!

t_ch: 确实，蛮狂躁的。
t_en: That's right. He's quite something.

t_ch: 确实，光看照片就觉得是个不好惹的角色……
t_en: Indeed, by the looks of his photo he really looks like a formidable character...

t_ch: 他只是和公司有私仇罢了。
t_en: He's just got a grudge against the IPC, that's all.

t_ch: 在对公司心怀仇恨的人里，他也算是格外危险的那一类。
t_en: Among those who harbor plenty of hatred against IPC, he's probably one of the more dangerous ones.

t_ch: 我听说他是个「巡海游侠」？这是什么组织啊？
t_en: I heard he's a Galaxy Ranger? What type of organization is that?

t_ch: 巡海游侠是一群各自为战的「巡猎」信徒，里面什么人都有。有相对比较好说话的，也有波提欧这种血债累累的通缉犯。
t_en: The Galaxy Rangers are a diverse group of individualistic warriors that are disciples of The Hunt. Some are pretty easy-going, but there's also bloodthirsty wanted criminals like Boothill.

t_ch: 「巡猎」信徒？那不是和仙舟人一样吗？就算他再怎么危险，也不会在信众兄弟的地盘上做坏事吧？
t_en: Disciples of The Hunt? So isn't he the same as Xianzhou folks? No matter how dangerous he is, he won't be causing trouble in the land of his fellow disciples, right?

t_ch: 在匹诺康尼接触过，人还不错。
t_en: I met him on Penacony. He's a pretty decent guy.

t_ch: 「还不错」的人会上公司的通缉名单吗？我可不信。
t_en: Would a "decent guy" be on the IPC's wanted list? I don't think so.

t_ch: 公司和贝洛伯格都信「存护」…
t_en: Both the IPC and Belobogians believe in the Preservation...

t_ch: 我明白你的意思了。
t_en: I take your point.

t_ch: 对啊…不对！公司也没对贝洛伯格做什么坏事啊！
t_en: Yeah... Wait, no! The IPC didn't do anything bad to Belobog!

t_ch: 总之你要当心，卢卡选手。公司的通缉要犯，可真不是闹着玩的。
t_en: You just have to be cautious, Luka. A wanted criminal on the IPC's list is really no joke.

t_ch: 哈哈，怕什么！我跟着师父维护下层区治安的时候，遇到的凶恶罪犯也不少啊！「磐岩镇黑鳏夫」还是我亲手抓获的呢！
t_en: Haha, what's there to be afraid of! When I was defending the Underworld with my master, I also met many hardened criminals! I even personally apprehended the Dark Widower of Boulder Town with my own two hands!

t_ch: （波提欧…公司通缉重犯…当着卡美丽小姐的面我有点不好意思说，但…感觉「公司通缉重犯」还真不一定是坏人。）
t_en: (Boothill... a fugitive wanted by the IPC... I'd hate to say it in front of Miss Carmella, but... I have a feeling this "wanted criminal" might not actually be such a bad guy.)

t_ch: （毕竟仙舟联盟也没通缉他，还允许他参加演武仪典呢。）
t_en: (After all, the Xianzhou Alliance didn't arrest him, and they even allowed him to participate in the Wardance.)

t_ch: （当然了，是坏人我也不怕。我这铁拳就是为了痛揍坏人才造出来的！）
t_en: (Of course, I'm not afraid of criminals. My Iron Fist is made to punish bad guys!)

t_ch: 卢卡，准备好对付波提欧了吗？
t_en: Luka, are you ready to go up against Boothill?

t_ch: 该去会会公司通缉重犯了！
t_en: It's time to go see what the IPC's wanted criminal is made of!

t_ch: 该去会会这位公司通缉重犯了！
t_en: It's time to go see what this criminal the IPC wants so bad is made of!

t_ch: 一定要小心哦！
t_en: Be careful!

t_ch: 再稍等一下。
t_en: Please give me a moment.

t_ch: 再稍等一下。
t_en: Please give me a moment.

t_ch: 万众瞩目的卢卡选手，又要面临一场恶战了！
t_en: All eyes are on Luka as he prepares for yet another fierce battle!

t_ch: 蓝方选手是万众瞩目的贝洛伯格拳王——「铁臂」卢卡！
t_en: In the blue corner, the highly anticipated boxing champion from Belobog — Luka "Strongarm"!

t_ch: 而红方选手竟然是，星际和平公司记录在案的通缉重犯——「巡海游侠」波提欧！
t_en: Fighting out of the red corner, it's none other than the notorious felon wanted by the IPC, the Galaxy Ranger — Boothill!

t_ch: 加油啊卢卡选手！打败波提欧然后交给我，赏金咱俩对半分！
t_en: Go for it Luka! Defeat Boothill and hand him over to me. We'll split the bounty in half!

t_ch: 你个小可爱！我早晚给你炖了！
t_en: You lil' fudgehead! I'll have you stewin' in a pot sooner or later!

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，宝了个贝的！竟然在这里见到你了！你也是来参赛的？
t_en: Butter my fudge and call me a biscuit! Can't believe I'm seeing you here, {NICKNAME}! You competin' too?

t_ch: 我是他的教练。
t_en: I'm his coach.

t_ch: 噢～我说参赛者名单上怎么没你呢。我还以为你他宝贝的在这儿埋伏我呢！
t_en: Oh! No wonder I didn't see your name on the list. I thought you were gonna fudgin' ambush me here!

t_ch: 我不参赛，怕失手打死你。
t_en: I'm not fighting. I might accidentally kill you.

t_ch: 哈哈哈哈，喵你宝贝！我看你是怕我一枪爱死你！
t_en: Hahahaha, you lil' cutie fudgepie! I think you're actually afraid that I might dog your cats in one shot!

t_ch: 原来你们这么熟啊？
t_en: You guys are close?

t_ch: 不算很熟，也就是过命的交情罢了。但我可不会对你手下留情。
t_en: We ain't exactly best buddies — our lives were just raveled in the tangles of destiny. But that don't mean I'll be showin' any mercy.

t_ch: 我也不会对你手下留情的。
t_en: I won't either.

t_ch: 小子，我认真劝你一句，退赛吧。你不是我的对手。
t_en: Lemme give you some real advice kid — drop out now. You ain't in my league.

t_ch: 比赛还没开始呢，你怎么就知道我打不过你？我的铁拳未必比你的子弹慢哦。
t_en: The match hasn't started. How do you know I can't defeat you? My fist might not be slower than your bullet.

t_ch: 因为咱俩他呜呜伯的不是一路人啊！你为胜利而来，我为仇恨而来。你为荣誉而来，但荣誉对我一文不值。
t_en: Diggity Wubbaboo, cause we ain't on the same path, pardner! You're here to win, I'm here for payback. You want honor, but honor ain't worth squat to me.

t_ch: 我想让全银河的新闻都登着——公司的通缉犯成为了演武仪典上最耀眼的明星，他大爱特爱，把来仙舟谈生意的公司狗们喵得灰头土脸——
t_en: I wanna see every news outlet in the cosmos buzzin' with the headline "The IPC's most wanted man stole the spotlight at the Wardance. He came out with the fudge blazin' and sure made them IPC shirtbags choke on the humble pie."

t_ch: 波提欧先生，我不知道你与公司之间有什么恩怨…但我觉得我们没什么不同，不都是想要全银河的瞩目嘛！
t_en: Mr. Boothill, I don't know what kind of grudge you hold against the IPC... But I don't think we're too different. We both want the whole cosmos' eyes on us!

t_ch: 行行行，老子不跟你抬杠。既然你这么想要我的子弹，那我也不好推辞，是吧？呵，来这里之前，我在鉴爻轩向帝弓司命求了六个吉签。
t_en: Alright, alright, I ain't gonna argue with ya. If you want my bullets that bad, who am I to refuse, right? Well, before I came here, I drew six lucky Weals at The Looking Bronze in front of the Reignbow Arbiter.

t_ch: 这样吧…如果接下来我的六发子弹都卡壳，就算你赢。但若是子弹没卡壳…啧啧，这擂台的地板可就不好收拾咯～
t_en: Tell you what... if my next six shots jam, you win. But if they don't... well, this ring's floor is gonna be a real mess, ain't it?

t_ch: 呃，波提欧先生，我们只是切磋而已，点到为止就好，倒也不必以命相搏……
t_en: Uh, Mr. Boothill, we're just sparring, that's all. Let's not risk our lives.

t_ch: 他呜呜伯的，有人跟你闹着玩，我可不跟你闹着玩！我偏要跟你以命相搏，你没这个胆子，上这儿来干嘛？
t_en: Dadgum Wubbaboo! Others might play games with you, but I ain't playing! I'm putting my life on the line here, but if you don't even have the guts to do the same, then what are you here for?

t_ch: 来，看着我的枪口。走过来，揍我一拳。你敢吗？
t_en: Come on, look down the barrel of my gun. Walk over here and take a swing at me. You got the guts?

t_ch: 你吓到他了！
t_en: You're scaring him!

t_ch: 你这是干什么？
t_en: What are you doing?

t_ch: 波提欧！玩笑别开过头！
t_en: Boothill! You're going too far!

t_ch: 我在和卢卡老弟说话！让他自己回答我！
t_en: I'm speaking to Luka! Let him answer me!

t_ch: 卢卡！走过来！揍我一拳！你敢吗？！
t_en: Luka! C'mon! Get over here and take a swing at me! You got the guts?

t_ch: 说话！！！
t_en: Speak up!!!

t_ch: …来吧，波提欧。我会打败你的。
t_en: ...Bring it on, Boothill. I'll make you eat your own words!

t_ch: 哈哈哈哈哈！他呜呜伯的，有点胆色！枪弹无眼，你别怪我心狠啊！
t_en: Hahahaha! Screwubbaboo, you've got some guts! Bullets don't have eyes, so don't blame me for bein' ruthless!

t_ch: 另外，快别提你那宝贝爱的铁拳了，老子看见这公司赞助的破玩意儿就犯恶心！回头我来替你改装！
t_en: Also, quit yappin' about your forkin' Iron Fist. That IPC-sponsored piece of trash makes me sick! I'll give it a proper overhaul for ya later!

t_ch: （发生了什么…我…死了？）
t_en: (What's going on... Am I... dead?)

t_ch: （卢卡的状况真令人担心…还是快点回休息室看看他吧。）
t_en: (Luka's condition is worrying... Let's go see him at the lounge.)

t_ch: 那波提欧也太离谱了！要不是有这铁臂挡着，卢卡就要被他给…被他给……
t_en: That Boothill really went way overboard! If it weren't for Luka's Iron Arm, Luka would have been... would have been...

t_ch: …我们的水平差得太远了。你知道吗，在靠近他时，我仿佛…看到了「死亡」！
t_en: ...He's way out of my league. I swear, getting near him, I felt like... I was staring "Death" in the face.

t_ch: 卢卡选手……
t_en: Luka...

t_ch: 他大概是真心劝你退赛。
t_en: He was genuinely trying to convince you to drop out of the competition.

t_ch: 嗯，波提欧是对的。
t_en: Yea, and he was right.

t_ch: 他这次确实太过分了。
t_en: He really went overboard this time.

t_ch: 是我技不如人，波提欧没做错什么。
t_en: I was outclassed. Boothill didn't do anything wrong.

t_ch: 你的铁臂该怎么办？
t_en: What about your Iron Arm?

t_ch: 那不是我们现在要关心的问题吧！
t_en: I don't think that's what we should be worrying about right now!

t_ch: 克拉拉给我准备了几条备用拳套…但有什么用？还不是被波提欧一枪一个？
t_en: Clara prepared a couple of spare boxing gloves... But what's the use? They'll just get shot up one by one by Boothill anyway.

t_ch: 我这样没见过世面的乡巴佬，本就不该来参加这种比赛。水平差得太远了……
t_en: I'm such a country bumpkin. I shouldn't have come here in the first place! I'm WAY out of my league....

t_ch: 别气馁啊！记得吗？演武仪典有「人气复活」机制！现在全银河的观众都很喜欢你，他们会让你人气复活的！
t_en: Don't give up! Do you remember? The Wardance has a "popularity revival" mechanic! Now the entire cosmos loves you — they'll definitely revive you!

t_ch: 人气复活？也许大家只是想看我的笑话罢了…想看我怎么再次被人教训一顿，灰溜溜逃走。
t_en: Popularity revival? Maybe they all just want to turn me into a laughingstock... They just want to see me get beat up again and escape with my tail between my legs.

t_ch: 对不起了，杰帕德先生，布洛妮娅小姐…我，我只是个没用的废物。
t_en: I'm sorry, Mr. Gepard, Miss Bronya... I, I'm just a useless piece of nothing.

t_ch: 可是……
t_en: But...

t_ch: 抱歉，我想…我想一个人待一会……
t_en: Sorry, I... I want to be alone for a while...

t_ch: 唉…卢卡选手这么沮丧，我们还是先别打扰他了。
t_en: ...Luka is so depressed. Let's not bother him anymore.

t_ch: 我准备出去逛逛，看能不能找到什么能让卢卡选手重新振作起来的方法。
t_en: I'm gonna go shop around and see if there's anything that can cheer Luka up.

t_ch: 抱歉，{NICKNAME}，请让我一个人待一会……
t_en: Sorry, {NICKNAME}, please give me some space...

t_ch: （藿藿和尾巴似乎也到竞锋舰上了，找找他们吧……）
t_en: (Huohuo and Tail seem to be on the Skysplitter too. Let's look for them...)

t_ch: 看，{NICKNAME}好像到了……
t_en: Look, {NICKNAME} is here...

t_ch: 喂！{NICKNAME}，这边这边！快点！
t_en: Hey, {NICKNAME}! Over here! Quickly!

t_ch: {NICKNAME}～你好哇！最近幽囚狱里闹翻了天，我要出来也不容易。不过，能再次见到你还是很高兴。
t_en: Hello, {NICKNAME}! It's been a hectic few days recently in The Shackling Prison — I had a hard time trying to leave. I'm very happy to be seeing you again.

t_ch: 尾巴找我有事？
t_en: You looking for me, Tail?

t_ch: 当然了，老子在新闻里瞧见你作为教练登场了。你掺和的事情还不少啊……
t_en: Obviously. I saw in the news that you're a coach now. You've got your hands in all kinds of pies, haven't you...

t_ch: 于是心说要不要你给咱们藿藿也好好训练训练，让她登上演武仪典和人面对面打上几场。这不比看什么恐怖片更能练胆量？
t_en: I was thinking you could train Huohuo properly, and have her attend the Wardance to fight against a few others. Isn't this much more effective at training one's bravery than watching horror flicks?

t_ch: 你们也来参加演武仪典呗？
t_en: You're also here to participate in the Wardance?

t_ch: 哟呵！{F#小姑娘}{M#小子}你是我肚子里的蛔虫吗？
t_en: Whoa! Kid, are you a mind reader or something?

t_ch: 老子看到你给演武仪典的选手做教练了。这不，也想你给咱们藿藿也好好训练训练，让她登上演武仪典和人面对面打上几场，这不比看什么恐怖片更能练胆量？
t_en: I see that you're coaching a Wardance contender. How about training Huohuo, so she can join the Wardance and fight against a few others. Isn't this much more effective at training one's bravery than watching horror flicks?

t_ch: 唉，你存着这个心思啊？！不行，不行不行不行！
t_en: Ah—!? That's what you were thinking about? No, no no no no!

t_ch: 我被打一拳，恐怕会哭很久吧。呜…放过我吧！
t_en: One punch, and I probably won't stop crying for ages.  ...Please don't do this to me!

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，你训练的那个小子…呃叫卢卡的，这不正好败退了嘛，无缝衔接上咱们藿藿，还有比这更好的时机吗?
t_en: {NICKNAME}, that kid you're training... Luka or whatever his name is. He got beat anyway. Isn't this the perfect opportunity to throw Huohuo into the mix?

t_ch: 对了，卢卡先生还好吗？我看新闻上他下场时都快站不稳了。
t_en: Oh right, is Mr. Luka doing all right? The news said he couldn't even stand.

t_ch: 没事的，卢卡先生的人气也很高，肯定能通过「人气复活」重返赛场！请您给他加油鼓劲！
t_en: Since Mr. Luka is really popular, he'll definitely clear the popularity revival vote and return! Please cheer him on!

t_ch: 哎哟我去…什么加油鼓劲，你个小怂包就是转移话题，不想去打演武仪典呗？
t_en: Ugh, what cheering? You're just trying to change the subject, you timid brat. You don't want to fight in the Wardance, do you?

t_ch: （长叹一声）
t_en: (Heave a long sigh)

t_ch: 诶呀妈呀，你这叹气都快把我给吹走了。
t_en: Whoa, that sigh of yours almost blew me away.

t_ch: 为什么叹气呀？是出了什么问题吗……
t_en: Why the long sigh? Is there a problem...?

t_ch: 他不打算参加复活赛了。
t_en: He's decided not to participate in the repechage.

t_ch: 啊？为什么啊？
t_en: Huh? Why?

t_ch: 他让人打傻了吧？
t_en: He got beat senseless?

t_ch: 你向藿藿和尾巴解释了卢卡日益严重的幻觉，还有失去战意的现状。
t_en: You explain to Huohuo and Tail about Luka's worsening hallucinations and his current lack of fighting spirit.

t_ch: 幻觉？我看是借口！让人打了一顿就连比赛都放弃了？
t_en: Hallucinations? Just excuses, I bet! He's bowing out just because he got thrashed?

t_ch: 号外，号外！比咱们藿藿还弱的怂包终于给找着了！
t_en: Extra! Extra! Brat even more cowardly than Huohuo discovered! Read all about it!

t_ch: 也不能这么说吧，尾巴大爷…意识到自己与对手之间难以跨越的差距，肯定是会备受打击的呀！
t_en: Don't say that, Mr. Tail... It's probably really emotionally damaging to realize how huge the skill gap is between you and your opponent!

t_ch: 这是你不想去打比赛的理由吗？
t_en: Is that the reason you don't want to fight?

t_ch: 既然这小子放弃比赛了，那{NICKNAME}，你就把藿藿好好操练操练，别惦记这些破事了。
t_en: If that kid wants to forfeit the match, {NICKNAME}, why don't you give Huohuo some proper training and forget about this mess?

t_ch: 其实…幻觉也…也不是完全没办法的。只要有一个特别擅长帮人解决心理问题、还很好心眼的岁阳能帮忙……
t_en: Actually... hallucinations... Th—There's a way to deal with them. As long as there's someone who's superb at dealing with matters of the heart, and a kind-hearted heliobus willing to help out...

t_ch: 藿藿朝你挤了挤眼睛，暗示你与她一起进行道德绑架。
t_en: Huohuo winked at you, hinting at joining her in the guilt tripping.

t_ch: 是啊…可惜难找那么好的岁阳…
t_en: Yeah... Sad that it's hard to find such compassionate heliobi these days...

t_ch: 嗯？你们看我干什么？
t_en: Huh? What are you lot looking at me for?

t_ch: 该上哪里找那么厉害的岁阳呢？
t_en: Where would we even find such a heliobus?

t_ch: 嗯？你们看我干什么？
t_en: Huh? What are you lot looking at me for?

t_ch: 藿藿你怎么了？眼睛干吗？
t_en: Huohuo, what's wrong? Are your eyes dry?

t_ch: 咿…我没有……
t_en: Eek... No...

t_ch: 老子知道怎么了，她眼睛里有爪子。
t_en: I know what's wrong. Her eyes have claws in 'em.

t_ch: …你们不要这么看着老子！老子长得像心理医士吗？
t_en: ...Stop looking at me like that! Do I look like a psychiatrist to you?

t_ch: 真拿你们没办法…你们是不是觉得老子特别好用啊？下次老子可要收费了啊。
t_en: Bah, you people... I bet you think I'm super useful, don't you? I'm charging a fee next time.

t_ch: 谢谢尾巴大爷！
t_en: Thank you, Mr. Tail!

t_ch: 谢谢尾巴大爷！
t_en: Thank you, Mr. Tail!

t_ch: 谁叫老子耳根子软呢？
t_en: You're lucky I'm a big softie on the inside.

t_ch: 算你识相。
t_en: At least you're being reasonable now.

t_ch: 信不信老子抽你？
t_en: You wanna get smacked?

t_ch: 卢卡现在人在哪儿？带老子去见见他吧。
t_en: Where's Luka now? Take me to him.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，你回来了？请问这两位是？
t_en: {NICKNAME}, you're back? Who are these two?

t_ch: 是两位卢卡的粉丝。
t_en: They're Luka's fans.

t_ch: 原来是卢卡选手的粉丝呀！卢卡选手，有粉丝来看你了！
t_en: Ooh, Luka's fans! Luka, your fans are here to see you!

t_ch: 等等…这是什么东西！鬼，是鬼啊！原来卢卡选手的粉丝群体已经这么广了啊！
t_en: Hang on... What's this! I—It's a ghost! To think Luka has fans from realms that transcend mortality!

t_ch: 老子对大惊小怪已经见怪不怪了。
t_en: Good thing I'm already used to such reactions.

t_ch: 卢卡你好…我叫藿藿，那位是尾巴大爷。我们是你的粉丝……
t_en: Hello Luka... I'm Huohuo, and this here is Mr. Tail. We're your fans...

t_ch: 原来是我的粉丝，对不起，让你们失望了。
t_en: Ah, my fans... Sorry to have disappointed you.

t_ch: 哎…卢卡选手现在真的很消沉，对什么都提不起劲。我给他点了两斤烤肉，想让他吃些好吃的，开心一点。但他…无精打采地吃光了。
t_en: ...Luka's really down in the dumps now, and he can't lift his spirits up for anything. I ordered a couple pounds of grilled meat for him so he might have a feast to cheer him up, but he just sat there all moody and devoured the lot.

t_ch: 他倒是不耽误干饭。
t_en: At least his appetite hasn't changed.

t_ch: 就算心情再怎么不好，高质量的蛋白质也是无辜的。
t_en: No matter how bad my mood is, high-quality protein is never to blame.

t_ch: 全都吃了？
t_en: You ate it all?

t_ch: 这就是传说中「报仇雪恨般地干饭」吧。
t_en: This must be the fabled manifestation of "eating with a vengeance."

t_ch: 其实，卢卡先生，我们是{NICKNAME}请来，专门为您治疗抑郁情绪和幻觉的治疗师。
t_en: Actually, Mr. Luka, we're healers invited by {NICKNAME} to help you with your depressive emotions and hallucinations.

t_ch: 把「们」字去掉，能办到这么厉害的事情的，只有老子！
t_en: There is no "we." I'm the only one here who's powerful enough to perform such a difficult task!

t_ch: 各位，我已经退赛了。请不要再为我这样没用的东西浪费时间和金钱了。
t_en: Everyone, I've already withdrawn from the tournament. Please stop wasting your time and money on someone as useless as me.

t_ch: 受不了了，他散发的沮丧让老子浑身难受。赶紧让老子动手吧。
t_en: Gah, I can't take it. The depression he's radiating is making even me uncomfortable. Hurry up and lemme at him.

t_ch: 靠你了，尾巴大爷。
t_en: I'm counting on you, Mr. Tail.

t_ch: 下次开始我真的要收费了啊！
t_en: I'm really going to start charging money next time!

t_ch: 嗯？这位…尾巴大爷？你怎么突然靠得这么近？
t_en: Uh? This... Mr. Tail? What are you doing so close to me?

t_ch: 好、好冷！忍不住就打了个哆嗦……
t_en: C—Cold! I was shivering for a second there...

t_ch: 稍等一下。
t_en: Just a minute.

t_ch: 你真够磨蹭的，快点！
t_en: Stop wasting time! Hurry up!

t_ch: 老子准备动手了，可以吧？
t_en: I'm going to start, that good?

t_ch: 靠你了，尾巴大爷。
t_en: I'm counting on you, Mr. Tail.

t_ch: 下次开始我真的要收费了啊！
t_en: I'm really going to start charging money next time!

t_ch: 嗯？这位…尾巴大爷？你怎么突然靠得这么近？
t_en: Uh? This... Mr. Tail? What are you doing so close to me?

t_ch: 好、好冷！忍不住就打了个哆嗦……
t_en: C—Cold! I was shivering for a second there...

t_ch: 稍等一下。
t_en: Just a minute.

t_ch: 你真够磨蹭的，快点！
t_en: Stop wasting time! Hurry up!

t_ch: 卡美丽小姐，{NICKNAME}教练，对不起，我不该轻易地放弃。
t_en: Miss Carmella, Coach {NICKNAME}, I'm sorry. I shouldn't have given up so easily.

t_ch: 卢卡选手，你这是怎么了？
t_en: Luka, what's with you?

t_ch: 你想通了？
t_en: You got it all figured out?

t_ch: 他被改心了…
t_en: He's changed his mind...

t_ch: 我决定了，要参加人气复活赛，重返演武仪典的擂台！
t_en: I've decided to participate in the popularity revival repechage and return to the Wardance's stage!

t_ch: 太好了！卢卡选手！你终于振作起来了！
t_en: That's great! Luka, you've finally come around!

t_ch: 太好了，刚才看你那么消沉，我也觉得很难过。
t_en: That's fantastic. I was sad seeing you so depressed just now.

t_ch: 能振作起来就好！
t_en: It's good that you've snapped out of it!

t_ch: 嗯，谢谢你们，我绝对不会再打退堂鼓了。
t_en: Yes, thank you, all of you. I'll never back down from a fight ever again.

t_ch: 先去做十组引体向上复健吧！
t_en: Now go do ten sets of pull-ups to warm up!

t_ch: 好冷血的教练！
t_en: You're such a brutal coach!

t_ch: 不过，刚才发生了什么…怎么绿光一闪，卢卡选手就振作起来了？这疗法是不是有些…太快了？
t_en: But, what happened just now... Luka just came to his senses after that green flash of light? This treatment is a little too... effective, isn't it?

t_ch: 可能是因为来罗浮以后见过了太多奇形怪状的东西，见识到尾巴大爷的本领，我竟然都不怎么觉得惊讶了。
t_en: Maybe it's because I've seen too many bizarre things after arriving on the Luofu. But after witnessing Mr. Tail's capability, I'm actually surprised that I'm not very surprised at all.

t_ch: 喂！你小子说谁是奇形怪状的东西呢！
t_en: Hey! Who're you calling a bizarre thing!

t_ch: 说起来，那个人气复活赛不是要靠人气抢名额的吗？卢卡先生现在有参加复活赛的资格吗？
t_en: Speaking of which, doesn't the popularity revival repechage rely on popularity votes? Is Mr. Luka qualified to join the repechage?

t_ch: 我看看…我看看……
t_en: Let's see... Let's see...

t_ch: 找找找找找到了！卢卡选手！名单！复活赛！有他！
t_en: I—I—I—I found it! Luka! The list! The repechage! He's in it!

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，看来你们有的要忙了。可惜啊！让藿藿上擂台被打的计划要暂时搁置了。
t_en: {NICKNAME}, looks like you're going to be busy. A pity! I'll have to temporarily shelve my plan to have Huohuo get pummeled.

t_ch: 尾！巴！大！爷！
t_en: Mis! Ter! Tail!

t_ch: 溜了溜了。
t_en: I'm out.

t_ch: 我去送送他们。
t_en: I'll see them off.

t_ch: 再见！请二位下次再来看我的比赛！我一定不辜负你们的帮助！
t_en: Goodbye! Please come see my match again next time! I won't disappoint you, after all the help you've given me!

t_ch: 行了，你就送到这里吧，赶紧回去忙你的事。
t_en: Okay, this is far enough. Go back and take care of your business.

t_ch: 呜…憋着秘密我实在难受，{NICKNAME}，我要向你坦白，其实尾巴大爷这次找你来……
t_en: Ooo-er... It's suffocating trying to keep a secret. {NICKNAME}, I have to spill the beans. Mr. Tail actually came to look for you to...

t_ch: 你敢！
t_en: You dare!

t_ch: 藿藿你大胆地说！
t_en: Huohuo, don't be afraid to speak your mind

t_ch: 我就知道是尾巴想念我。
t_en: I knew Tail missed me.

t_ch: 呜呜呜…尾巴大爷！对不起！其实是因为，尾巴大爷很喜欢看卢卡选手打拳。
t_en: I'm sorry, Mr. Tail! In truth, Mr. Tail really likes watching Luka's fights.

t_ch: 你这丫头！这保密意识还当判官呢！算了，回去再和你算账。
t_en: You rascal! How are you even a Judge when you can't even keep a secret! Agh forget it! I'll deal with you when we get back.

t_ch: 总之事情就是你听到的这样。你给老子好好当教练，让那小子漂漂亮亮赢几场，知道了吗？
t_en: Anyway, you heard it. You better be a good coach and make sure that kid wins a few matches in style, got it?

t_ch: 我定不辱使命。
t_en: I won't let you down.

t_ch: 嗯…那就拜托你啦！
t_en: Good... I'm counting on you then!

t_ch: 你在教我做事？
t_en: You're teaching me how to do my job?

t_ch: 老子跟你说正经的呢！
t_en: I'm trying to be serious with you!

t_ch: 我们走了，回头见。
t_en: We're leaving. See you some other time.

t_ch: 再见！人气复活赛一定要加油哦～
t_en: Bye! Do your best in the popularity revival repechage!

t_ch: 要帮那小子重拾信心，那就要找到打击他信心的根源，然后铲除掉。
t_en: If we're to help the kid find his confidence again, we'll have to strike at the root of the problem and remove it completely.

t_ch: 麻烦死了，速战速决吧。
t_en: So annoying. Let's just make it quick.

t_ch: 玛吉！你又来看我比赛啦？
t_en: Margie! You're here to watch me fight again?

t_ch: 嗯嗯！卢卡哥哥真的太厉害了！那三个大块头出来的时候，我都吓坏了…结果你还是把他们都打败了！
t_en: Yeah! You're just too strong! I was so scared when those three big guys came out... But you managed to beat them all!

t_ch: 真希望有一天，我也能变得和卢卡哥哥一样强大！
t_en: I really hope I can grow up to be strong like Luka one day!

t_ch: 你当然可以啦！只要好好吃饭、好好睡觉、好好锻炼身体，玛吉一定能变得比我更厉害！到时候你就在拳台上三两下把我打趴，然后大喊一声！
t_en: Of course you will! You just have to eat well, sleep well, train well, and you'll be even stronger than I am! When that happens, you'll be able to KO me in just a few punches, and then yell triumphantly in the ring!

t_ch: 「熔锤出身的勇士，无敌的磐岩冠军——让世界上的邪恶无处遁形！」
t_en: "The Moltammerville warrior, the peerless Boulder Champion... Defeater of evil throughout the world!"

t_ch: 哈哈哈哈！不行，卢卡哥哥！那是打败坏人时的台词！
t_en: Hahaha! Not that, Luka! That's the line when you defeat the baddies!

t_ch: 时间也不早了，你早点回家休息吧，要早睡早起才能长大高个哦～
t_en: It's getting late. You should be getting home. The early bird gets the worm — that's how you grow up big and strong!

t_ch: 那个…卢卡哥哥…我可能不能来看你的下一场比赛了……
t_en: Umm... Luka... I might not be able to watch your next match...

t_ch: 嗯？没关系啦，就算你没时间过来，卢卡哥哥也知道你在支持他！但是下下场要记得过来哦，那场我要对付「断头歌者」康尔乔尼，绝对不容错过！
t_en: Hmm? That's all right. Even if you're busy, I know you've always got my back! Just remember to come by for the match after that. I'm facing off against the Decapitating Singer Kongiorni, and you can't miss it!

t_ch: 卢卡哥哥…下下场我可能也来不了了…接下来很长一段时间，我可能都来不了了……
t_en: Luka... I don't think I can make it for that either... For a long time after this, I might not be able to come...

t_ch: 嗯？是发生什么事了吗？
t_en: Hmm? What happened?

t_ch: 真希望有一天，我也能变得和卢卡哥哥一样强大……
t_en: I really hope I can grow up to be strong like Luka one day...

t_ch: 玛吉？玛吉你去哪儿了？玛吉？玛吉！玛吉！
t_en: Margie? Margie, where are you? Margie? Margie! Margie!

t_ch: 你怎么不见了…我还没看到你变强之后的样子呢……
t_en: Where did you go...? I still haven't seen you grow up big and strong...

t_ch: 卢卡，那小女孩是谁啊？
t_en: Luka, who is that little girl?

t_ch: 她叫玛吉，是我的一个粉丝。每次比赛她都会来看。后来逐渐熟悉了，我们也会聊聊天。但自始至终，我都不太了解她的情况。
t_en: Her name's Margie, a fan of mine. She always came to watch all my matches. We got to know each other later, and started chatting. But in the end, I still didn't really understand her situation.

t_ch: 很久以后我才知道，那时的她已经生了重病，在和病痛搏斗。下层区实在太穷了，医生就算尽了最大努力，也还是治不好她……
t_en: It wasn't until much later that I learned she had a serious illness, and was battling for her life against it. The Underworld is impoverished, and the doctors tried their best, but they couldn't cure her...

t_ch: 唉…节哀顺变吧，卢卡。
t_en: My condolences, Luka.

t_ch: 你可能不熟悉我出生的地方。在我还是个孩子的时候，大家都生活的很苦很苦，每天都有人在死亡的边缘挣扎……
t_en: You may not be familiar with the place of my birth. When I was still a child, everyone led hard lives, teetering on the brink of death at all times...

t_ch: 有些人死于怪物，有些人死于匪徒…我见过很多很多死亡。那时候我觉得，是我们太弱了。只要我变得强一点，再强一点，只要强一点，我们就能战胜对手，继续活下去。
t_en: Some died to monsters, others to bandits... I've seen so much death. Back then, I thought we were just too weak. If I could get just a little stronger, even just a little, we could vanquish our foes, and keep on living.

t_ch: 后来我的确变强了，成了打遍下层区的拳王。那时我觉得，只要挥动拳头，没有谁是我的对手。我可以成为下层区所有孩子们的榜样！
t_en: I did get stronger later on, and became the boxing champion who trounced the entire Underworld. At that time, I believed that as long as I swung my fists, no one could defeat me. I could be a role model for all the kids in the Underworld.

t_ch: 我可以告诉他们，就算面对再可怕的对手，只要战斗，我们能赢的，我们一定会赢的！
t_en: I could tell them that no matter how scary the opponent was, as long as we kept on fighting, we would win out. We would definitely win!

t_ch: 可是，当我想把胜利的消息告诉玛吉的时候，她的父亲却告诉我，她不在了。
t_en: But, when I wanted to tell Margie the news about my victory, her father told me she was gone.

t_ch: 玛吉…拖着这么小小的身子，一直在和病魔战斗。她一直在战斗，她必须赢下这一场啊！
t_en: Margie... She was battling the demons of her sickness with that frail, tiny body of hers. She was always battling — she must win the next round!

t_ch: 到头来，我终于明白了，人生到处都是打不赢的仗，有些战斗即使不得不赢，也还是会输。
t_en: In the end, I finally understood that there are always unwinnable battles in life. Some fights, no matter how much you need to win, you still lose.

t_ch: 就像面对波提欧先生的时候那样。我骗了那些孩子…我也骗了我自己。我无法面对他们。
t_en: Just like when I faced off against Mr. Boothill. I lied to those kids... and to myself. I can't face them.

t_ch: 唉…他在逃避问题。追上去看看吧。
t_en: Ugh... He is avoiding the problem. Let's catch up and see how it goes.

t_ch: 他呜呜伯的，有人跟你闹着玩，我可不跟你闹着玩！我偏要跟你以命相搏，你没这个胆子，上这儿来干嘛？
t_en: Dadgum Wubbaboo! Others might play games with you, but I ain't playing! I'm putting my life on the line here, but if you don't even have the guts to do the same, then what are you here for?

t_ch: 来，看着我的枪口。走过来，揍我一拳。你敢吗？
t_en: Come on, look down the barrel of my gun. Walk over here and take a swing at me. You got the guts?

t_ch: 卢卡！走过来！揍我一拳！你敢吗！
t_en: Luka! C'mon! Get over here and take a swing at me! You got the guts?

t_ch: 说话！！！
t_en: Speak up!!!

t_ch: …来吧，波提欧先生。我会打败你的。
t_en: ...Bring it on, Boothill. I'll make you eat your own words!

t_ch: 哈哈哈哈哈！他呜呜伯的，有点胆色！枪弹无眼，你别怪我心狠啊！
t_en: Hahahaha! Screwubbaboo, you've got some guts! Bullets don't have eyes, so don't blame me for bein' ruthless!

t_ch: 老子觉得你败得很体面。不是人人都有胆识，面对黑洞洞的枪口，还冲上去给他一拳的。
t_en: I thought your defeat was graceful. Not everyone has the guts to charge at a loaded gun and land a punch.

t_ch: 那我还能怎么办呢？
t_en: What else could I do?

t_ch: 我转身离去？我认输？这与我冲上去拼一把有什么本质区别吗？因为无论怎么选，当时我的命都不在我自己手里。
t_en: Turn around and leave? Accept defeat? How is that any different than taking a desperate stand? No matter what I chose, my life wasn't in my own hands.

t_ch: 你明白吗？只要他想干掉我，我一丁点反抗的余地都没有。归根结底，是波提欧先生饶了我一命。
t_en: Don't you get it? If he wanted me dead, I wouldn't have had the chance to even muster an ounce of resistance. In short, it was Mr. Boothill who spared my life.

t_ch: 我讨厌这种感觉…我觉得自己无能为力，被人家拿捏在手心里，无论怎么反抗都像笑话似的。
t_en: I hate this feeling... It makes me feel powerless, like my life is within the palm of their hand, and all my efforts to fight back seem like a joke.

t_ch: 玛吉那孩子，在面对病魔的时候，一定也是这种感觉吧？
t_en: That girl Margie, when she confronted the demons of her sickness, she must've felt this way too, no?

t_ch: 白痴，这世上有什么东西是不被宇宙「拿捏在手心里」的吗？连咱们岁阳的老祖宗都被困在了炉子里，连星神也必须走在命途上。自由？自由很重要吗？
t_en: You idiot, is there anything in this world that isn't "in the palm of the universe?" Even our heliobi ancestors were trapped in the furnace. Even the Aeons must walk their Path. Freedom? Is freedom really that important?

t_ch: 你不明白，尾巴大爷，我只是不想输。
t_en: You don't get it, Mr. Tail. I just don't want to lose.

t_ch: 怎么又跑了？算了，也快进入他内心深处了…那里应该就藏着让他失去信心的梦魇。
t_en: Why'd he run off again? Forget it. We're almost in the depths of his inner world... The nightmare causing his loss of faith should be hiding there.

t_ch: 快跑、快跑！快跑啊蠢货！你赢不了的！你会死的！
t_en: Run, run! Run, you fool! You can't win! You'll die!

t_ch: 快跑啊！快跑！逃命吧，你赢不了的！
t_en: Run away, quickly! Flee! You can't win!

t_ch: 回贝洛伯格吧，你的水平差得太多了！你会死的！
t_en: Run back to Belobog. The skill gap is too much! You'll die!

t_ch: 你还想荣归故里，扬名立万？做梦吧！你根本就赢不了！快跑！你难道不怕死吗！
t_en: You're still thinking of bringing glory back home, to have your name exalted? Dream on! You absolutely can't win! Run! Are you not afraid of death!?

t_ch: 喂！你们这些鬼东西，别在这儿废话了！赶紧给我滚蛋！
t_en: Hey! You pieces of trash! Stop spewing nonsense here! Scram!

t_ch: 你是谁？你不属于这里！你不该在这里！你是…异物！
t_en: Who are you? You don't belong here! You should not be here! You are... invaders!

t_ch: 异物…需要清除！
t_en: Invaders... must be purged!

t_ch: 笑死，还想清除老子？真是倒反天罡！
t_en: You're kidding. You're trying to get rid of me? This is outrageous!

t_ch: 卢卡，那些扰乱你内心的杂音已经被我清除干净了，你给老子振作点！
t_en: Luka, I've cleared out that noise messing with your head. You better get it together!

t_ch: 「杂音」？杰帕德先生——他是贝洛伯格的一位军官——和我说过类似的话。
t_en: Noise? Mr. Gepard... uh, an officer in Belobog... He said something like that too....

t_ch: 「人内心的声音特别嘈杂，在安全舒适的地方尤其如此。有些你心中极为重要的声音，反而只有在那些痛苦、不安、危险的时候才能被你听清楚。」
t_en: "A person's inner voices make far too much noise, especially so during safe and quiet moments. Ironically, the voices that truly matter often become audible only in moments of pain, discomfort, and peril."

t_ch: 当面对波提欧黑洞洞的枪口时，我发现杰帕德先生是对的。我的内心充满了平静，只剩下一个声音在不断呐喊，那声音越来越大，直到盖过了周遭的一切……
t_en: When I was staring down the barrel of Boothill's gun, I realized Mr. Gepard was right. My inner heart was at peace, there was only one sound that was yelling non-stop. It got louder and louder, till it just overwhelmed everything around me...

t_ch: 那声音说：「快跑！快跑！快跑！再不跑你就死了！」
t_en: That voice said: "Run! Run! Run away quickly! You'll die if you don't!"

t_ch: 那就是深陷危险时，我心中的最真实的声音。我想这也许意味着，我并不像自己以为的那样强大……
t_en: That was the truest voice in my heart when I stared danger in the face. I guess it means I'm not as strong as I thought I was...

t_ch: 那你的内心让你快跑，你为什么还是冲上去了？
t_en: Your inner voice told you to run, so why did you still charge towards him?

t_ch: 因为那时还有另一个更微弱的声音，微弱到我几乎听不见，但它还是真切地传到了我的耳朵里…那个声音说：「如果现在逃跑，你还不如就这么死了。」
t_en: Because there was another weaker voice, so weak that I could barely hear it. But it still managed to reach my ears... It said: "If you run now, you might as well just die here."

t_ch: 所以你做得很好，你冲上去了。
t_en: So you did well — you charged forth.

t_ch: 可是我输了啊，尾巴大爷。我听从了那个「极为重要的声音」，然后输得一塌糊涂。
t_en: But I lost, Mr. Tail. I listened to that very important voice, and I lost terribly.

t_ch: 就算再复活，我也还是会输。今天不输，明天也会输。我变得再怎么强，也还是早晚会输。
t_en: Even if I were to be revived, I would still lose. If not today, then tomorrow. No matter how strong I become, I would still eventually lose.

t_ch: 笑死老子，你说的这不是废话吗？
t_en: My sides! You're killing me here. You're a real comedian. Isn't that just common sense?

t_ch: 你们人类是很脆弱的——当然岁阳也是，但这不是重点，重点是…
t_en: You humans are very fragile. Heliobi are too, of course, but that's not the point. The point is...

t_ch: 人生就是一场必败的擂台啊。衰老病痛，求之不得，嘿嘿，每一样都能把你干趴下。死亡再来给你补上最后一拳，叫你…呃不是，叫你的亲朋好友哭唧唧。
t_en: Life is a fight in a ring you're bound to lose. Aging, disease, unattainable desires — each one will knock you out. Death just lands the final blow, making your friends and family cry.

t_ch: 可如果无论如何都只有「惨败」这一条路可走，那到底怎么才算「赢」呢？
t_en: If there is nothing but a path of complete and utter defeat to walk, what exactly can be considered "winning?"

t_ch: 笨蛋！这种事问别人有屁用？那不应该是你自己说了算吗？
t_en: Fool! What's the point of asking someone else this question? Isn't that something that only you can define?

t_ch: 我…不明白……
t_en: I... don't understand...

t_ch: 笨死你算了！老子问你一个问题，你好好回答——
t_en: You might as well be a single-celled organism! Let me ask you a question, and answer it properly...

t_ch: 你那个小粉丝——玛吉，她和病痛斗了一辈子，最后也没斗过。你说说看，她输了吗？
t_en: That young fan of yours, Margie. She fought with her illness her entire life, and she didn't make it through in the end. Tell me, did she lose?

t_ch: 她输了。
t_en: She did.

t_ch: 唉？
t_en: Eh?

t_ch: 但她很努力地做了一切该做的事情，她一直在向病魔挥拳…一拳接着一拳，她才是最棒的拳手！在我心里，玛吉赢了！她赢得很漂亮。
t_en: But she tried her best in everything she did, and she was always putting up a fight against her sickness... One punch after the next, she was the greatest boxer there ever was! In my heart? Margie won. And she won in style.

t_ch: 你这不是明白得很吗？擂台上有输赢的标准。但评判这条命，我们自己才最有资格。
t_en: See, you fully understand, don't you? There are rules to victory and defeat in the ring. But with our lives, only we get to dictate the rules.

t_ch: 卢卡，重要的永远是挥下一拳！
t_en: Luka, the most important thing is to always throw the next punch!

t_ch: 重要的…永远是挥下一拳！谢谢你，尾巴大爷——
t_en: Most important... is to always throw the next punch! Thank you, Mr. Tail!

t_ch: 停停停，我受不了别人谢我。你既然振作起来，就好好打你的复活赛！
t_en: Stop, stop, stop it! I can't stand people's gratitude. Now that you've gotten yourself together, it's time to give it your all in your repechage!

t_ch: （藿藿和尾巴已经回家了。我也该回休息室准备复活赛了。）
t_en: (Huohuo and Tail have gone home. I should also head back to the lounge to prepare for the repechage.)

t_ch: 既然获得了参加复活赛的机会，那我就必须好好把握这次机会，不能辜负大家的支持！
t_en: Since I've been given the chance to participate in the repechage, I have to make the most of it and not disappoint everyone who's been cheering me on!

t_ch: 你肯定能赢的。
t_en: I'm sure you'll win.

t_ch: 有你这样尽心尽力的教练，我当然会赢啦！
t_en: With a dedicated coach like you, of course, I'm going to win!

t_ch: 小心不要再输一次哦。
t_en: Make sure you don't lose again, okay?

t_ch: 对我有点信心嘛！况且就算输，我也要输得风风光光，绝不会像上次那样两腿发软被你们抬回来了！
t_en: Have some faith in me, please! Even if I lose, I'll go down with dignity. You guys won't have to carry me home like last time because my legs turned into jelly!

t_ch: 不过我还不太清楚，这人气复活赛是什么赛制啊？
t_en: But I'm still not quite clear, what are the rules for this popularity revival match?

t_ch: 据说前几届演武仪典，复活赛就是让高人气的淘汰者彼此混战，决选出唯一一个胜利者重归叩关赛。
t_en: According to the previous Wardances, the repechage is a free-for-all among popular contestants that have been eliminated. There's only one winner, and only the winner can rejoin the knockout stage.

t_ch: 不过景元将军修改了赛制，希望能给选手们更多机会，体现武者双方对决的美感。
t_en: But General Jing Yuan has amended the rules, hoping to give more opportunities for the contestants to showcase the beauty of duels.

t_ch: 听说罗浮请来了一位颇有声誉，以美德著称的战士作为评判复活挑战者的「裁判」。你们知道「纯美骑士」吗？
t_en: It is said that the Luofu has invited a highly reputable warrior known for his virtue to serve as the referee for the repechage. Have you guys heard of the Knight of Beauty?

t_ch: 老熟人了。
t_en: He's an old pal of mine.

t_ch: 星穹列车的社交圈也太广了吧！我参加个演武仪典都能碰到一堆和你称兄道弟的好朋友……
t_en: The Astral Express is so well-connected! I've run into so many friends of yours already while participating in the Wardance...

t_ch: 听起来更像是为了增加收视率。
t_en: Sounds more like a gimmick for publicity to me.

t_ch: 我也这么觉得。毕竟这一次演武仪典向许多世界都发出了邀请函。罗浮仙舟显然是想借此对外展示自己的繁荣。
t_en: I feel the same way. After all, many worlds are invited to participate in the Wardance this time. It's clear that the Xianzhou Luofu intends to showcase its prosperity to everyone through this tournament.

t_ch: 卢卡先生，您奋勇挥拳的英姿，一定能让这位骑士感受到您的美。我衷心祝愿您能获得胜利！
t_en: Mr. Luka, I'm sure the knight will see the beauty in your powerful punches. I truly hope you win!

t_ch: 谢谢你，卡美丽小姐。我一定会成功的！
t_en: Thanks, Miss Carmella. I will succeed!

t_ch: 这样一来，我也不用担心转正的问题了。
t_en: That way, I won't have to worry about getting a permanent role anymore.

t_ch: （我挥拳的样子，美吗？唔…自己哪能看得到自己挥拳的样子啊。）
t_en: (Do I look impressive when I punch? Hmm... it's not like I can see myself in action.)

t_ch: （那位纯美骑士会认可我吗？「纯美骑士团」听起来是个对美学很严格的组织……）
t_en: (Will I impress the Knight of Beauty? The Knights of Beauty sounds like an organization with high aesthetic standards...)

t_ch: （别想那么多了，卢卡！想想玛吉，重要的，永远是挥下一拳！）
t_en: (Don't overthink, Luka! Think about Margie and always focus on your next punch!)

t_ch: 怎么样，准备好去展示你的美学了吗？
t_en: Are you ready to showcase your style?

t_ch: 我一定会顺利复活的。
t_en: I'm going to win this.

t_ch: 准备好了，我一定会顺利复活的。
t_en: I'm all set. I'm going to win this.

t_ch: 肯定可以的！
t_en: No doubt about that!

t_ch: 再稍等一下。
t_en: Please give me a moment.

t_ch: 再稍等一下。
t_en: Please give me a moment.

t_ch: 接下来，挑战「纯美骑士」银枝的选手是，人气爆棚的少年英雄——「铁臂」卢卡！
t_en: The next contestant to challenge Argenti, the Knight of Beauty, is a super popular young hero — Luka "Strongarm"!

t_ch: 卢卡选手！全银河都在等待你重归赛场！我们爱你！
t_en: Luka, the entire cosmos has been waiting for your return! We all love ya!

t_ch: 银枝，果然是你。
t_en: As expected, it is you, Argenti.

t_ch: 又见面了，{NICKNAME}。你的姿态还是那样令人着迷。
t_en: Good to see you again, {NICKNAME}. Your demeanor is still as captivating as ever.

t_ch: 怎么哪都有你，你跟踪我？
t_en: Wherever I go, I see you. Are you stalking me?

t_ch: 我也感到惊奇…为何总会在不同世界的不同事件中与你相遇？我猜想，大约是因为我们践行的道路殊途同归，因而免不了彼此交汇吧。
t_en: I'm surprised too... Why do I keep running into you in different events across different worlds? If I may venture a guess, it's probably because the paths we tread lead to the same destination, so they're bound to converge.

t_ch: 尽管我还想多和你聊聊天，{NICKNAME}，但请你原谅我的冷落，因为今天的主角并不是你。而是卢卡。
t_en: As much as I want to keep chatting with you, {NICKNAME}, please forgive me for not giving you as much attention today. You're not the star of the day. It's Luka.

t_ch: 啊…初次见面，银枝先生，久仰大名…听说你特别厉害…我也很厉害！哈哈！
t_en: Um... it's a pleasure to meet you, Mr. Argenti. I've heard a lot about you... They say you're really great... I'm pretty good myself too! Haha!

t_ch: 我不是第一次见到你。你与波提欧对决的那场比赛，我在现场。
t_en: This isn't my first time seeing you. I was there when you had the duel with Boothill.

t_ch: 银枝先生，让您看笑话了。但可别因此小瞧我啊！
t_en: Mr. Argenti, I'm sorry you had to see that spectacle, but please don't underestimate me because of that!

t_ch: 不，不不不。你向前踏出一步，无畏地向恐怖的对手挥出拳头…那一幕真的很美，让我忍泪回味了许久。
t_en: No, not at all. When you stepped forward and swung your fist at a formidable opponent fearlessly, the beauty of that moment struck me. I've been replaying it in my mind for some time, and it always brings tears to my eyes.

t_ch: 你说的我都害羞了…输得那么惨，一点都不「美」吧。
t_en: You're making me blush... I lost so badly... It didn't really seem "beautiful" at all.

t_ch: 我必须纠正你的观点，卢卡——伊德莉拉的教诲里不包含「胜者比败者更美」这种歪理。
t_en: I must correct you, Luka — Idrila never promotes the twisted notion of winners being more beautiful than losers.

t_ch: 波提欧只是想吓你，但当时的你并不知晓这一点。你以为自己会死，但为了你的尊严、为了你的荣誉、为了你的家园，你依然向他挥出了一拳。
t_en: Boothill was only trying to scare you, but you weren't aware of that at that time. You thought you were dying, but for the sake of your dignity, honor, and home, you stood firm and threw a punch.

t_ch: 在我看来，这便是战斗美学的最好体现。
t_en: In my view, that's combat aesthetics at its finest.

t_ch: 不过，尽管我非常认可你，但按照演武仪典的规则，我们还是必须较量一番。
t_en: However, even though I hold you in high regard, we still have to compete according to the rules of the Wardance.

t_ch: 当然没问题！我绝不会辜负你对我的欣赏，银枝先生！
t_en: No problem! I won't disappoint you, Mr. Argenti!

t_ch: 非常好！我果然没有看错人。你的技巧、智慧和勇气，都在彰显着身为武人的「纯美」。
t_en: Excellent! I wasn't wrong about you. Your skills, wisdom, and courage embody the beauty of a martial artist.

t_ch: 银枝认可了卢卡选手的「美」！这也就意味着！
t_en: Argenti sees Beauty in Luka! That means...

t_ch: 「铁臂」卢卡即将重返演武仪典！
t_en: Luka "Strongarm" is set to make a comeback to the Wardance!

t_ch: 卢卡选手的粉丝在哪里？让我听到你们的尖叫声！3、2、1，燥起来！！！
t_en: Where are the Luka fans? Let me hear your holler! 3, 2, 1, make some noise!

t_ch: 银枝先生，我真的很感激你的认可。
t_en: Mr. Argenti, I'm truly grateful for your recognition.

t_ch: 不，我只是基于仙舟人授予我的权力，允许你重返擂台罢了。你根本不需要我的「认可」——你不需要任何人的「认可」。
t_en: Actually, I'm simply using the authority granted by the Xianzhou people to let you return to the tournament. You don't need my recognition at all, or anyone else's.

t_ch: 哈哈…你说的话太有哲理了，我其实有点听不懂……
t_en: Haha... It's hard to understand your words when they sound so philosophical...

t_ch: 无妨，请记住一件事：你已是战斗之美的化身。事实如此，无论胜负成败，抑或人言毁铄，都不能将之化为无形。
t_en: No matter. Just remember one thing: You're already the embodiment of the beauty of battle, which is a fact. Regardless of winning and losing, or what others may say, it can't be taken away from you.

t_ch: 嗯，我一定牢记于心…然后回去再理解消化一下，哈哈。
t_en: I'll keep that in mind... and try to digest its meaning when I'm back home, haha.

t_ch: 哦对了，我听说演武仪典中还有另一位擅用「铁臂」的选手。如果你们能相遇、对决，那该是一场多么壮美的舞蹈啊！
t_en: By the way, I heard there's another Wardance contestant who's good at using an iron arm. If you two are matched as opponents, it will surely be a magnificent dance!

t_ch: …另一位「铁臂」？是哪位选手?
t_en: ...Another "strong arm"? Who could that be?

t_ch: 告辞了，卢卡先生。
t_en: I shall take my leave, Mr. Luka.

t_ch: 青雀小姐又修复出其他记录了？
t_en: Miss Qingque has restored more parts of the record?

t_ch: 那我们赶快去看看吧…希望这次能解释伊戈尔为什么会来仙舟。
t_en: Let's check them out now... Hopefully, we'll find out the reason why Igor came to the Xianzhou.

t_ch: 喔！玲可快看，{NICKNAME}和卢卡来了～
t_en: Lynx, look! {NICKNAME} and Luka are here!

t_ch: 这玉兆损毁太严重了，我尽了最大努力，也还是只能修复出一小部分记录。
t_en: This jade abacus is too severely damaged. Even with my best efforts, I can only restore a small part of the record.

t_ch: 我们接下来要看到的这些，应该就是最后的记录了。
t_en: What we're about to watch should be the last of the records.

t_ch: 好可惜啊…
t_en: What a shame...

t_ch: 伊戈尔•哈夫特是雅利洛-Ⅵ的英雄，但我们都对他的生平经历知之甚少。找到这些资料，也算是进一步认识他了……
t_en: Igor Haft is a hero of Jarilo-VI, yet we know so little about his life. This information we've discovered can help us know him better...

t_ch: 希望至少能有关于仙舟的记录。
t_en: I hope there will be something about the Xianzhou.

t_ch: 是啊。这里毕竟是仙舟，也许我们还能找到几个认识他的人呢！哈哈！
t_en: Yeah. We're on the Xianzhou after all, so we might even find someone who here who knew him! Haha!

t_ch: 准备好了吗？我要开始播放咯。
t_en: Are you guys ready? I'm going to play it.

t_ch: 请开始吧，青雀小姐。
t_en: Go ahead, Miss Qingque.
*Sigh*

t_ch: 青雀小姐，你还好吗？
t_en: Miss Qingque, are you alright?

t_ch: 没什么，就是看完有些难过。
t_en: I'm fine. I just feel a bit blue after watching it.

t_ch: 公司太伪善了！
t_en: The IPC is so hypocritical!

t_ch: 贝洛伯格太可怜了！
t_en: My heart breaks for Belobog!

t_ch: 不过是宇宙中时刻在发生的事。
t_en: Such things happen in the universe all the time.

t_ch: 不管怎么说，这都已经是过去很久的事了。
t_en: Hey, it happened a long time ago.

t_ch: 是呀，青雀，别难过了。这只是历史。
t_en: You're right. Qingque, don't be sad. It's just history.

t_ch: 唉…正因为是历史故事，我才更觉得难过。
t_en: But... the fact that it's history makes it even sadder.

t_ch: 伊戈尔试图抓住所有微小的希望，他希望能有人来救救他的家园……
t_en: Igor grasped at every tiny sliver of hope for someone to rescue his home world...

t_ch: 当「仙舟联盟」这个名字出现的时候，我甚至幻想事情会这样展开——云骑军驰援雅利洛-Ⅵ，把上面的烬灭军团全部消灭，雅利洛-Ⅵ的人就这样度过了危机。
t_en: When the name Xianzhou Alliance was mentioned, I imagined things unfolding like this — the Cloud Knights went to Jarilo-VI as reinforcements and eliminated the Ruin Legion, and the people of Jarilo-VI emerged from the crisis.

t_ch: 但即使没有修复出此后的记录，我们这些未来人也非常清楚，事情没有这样展开。伊戈尔最后的希望，仙舟联盟，最终也没有来拯救他的家园。
t_en: Even without the records of what happened afterward, we know very well that things did not pan out that way. Igor's last hope — the Xianzhou Alliance — did not come to his world's rescue.

t_ch: 他的一切努力都失败了。
t_en: All his efforts were in vain.

t_ch: 不，青雀小姐，他没有失败。伊戈尔•哈夫特后来回到了雅利洛-Ⅵ，战斗在抵抗反物质军团的前线。
t_en: No, Miss Qingque. He didn't fail. Igor Haft later returned to Jarilo-VI and fought against the Antimatter Legion on the frontline.

t_ch: 他，还有许许多多像他这样的人，用自己的血肉之躯「存护」了「贝洛伯格」这座末日孤城。
t_en: He, along with many others like him, "preserved" the desolate city of Belobog with their flesh and blood.

t_ch: 我现在可以站在演武仪典的擂台上，像他一样为自己的家园而挥拳，这就说明他没有失败。
t_en: The fact that I can participate in the Wardance to fight for my home today shows that he didn't fail.

t_ch: 七百年前那些死去的人们，他们都没有失败！
t_en: Those who sacrificed their lives <unbreak>700</unbreak> years ago didn't fail either!

t_ch: 你说的没错，如果伊戈尔能看到你在演武仪典的擂台上有多风光，他也一定会很欣慰的。
t_en: You're right. If Igor could see how impressive you are on the Wardance stage, he would definitely be very proud.

t_ch: 可惜我们不知道，伊戈尔在演武仪典上是什么样子。
t_en: It's a pity we don't know how Igor performed at the Wardance back then.

t_ch: 我后来又跑去书库里翻了半天…七百年虽然说长也不算长，但正好卡在了一个动荡混乱的年代…第二次丰饶民战争的余波未止，很快又是饮月之乱。
t_en: I went to the repository the other day and did some digging. Seven hundred years ago was not too long ago, but it was a turbulent era... The aftermath of the second Denizens of Abundance War still lingered, and the Sedition of Imbibitor Lunae soon followed.

t_ch: 我甚至找不出一张完整的参赛选手名单，更没找到伊戈尔的名字。
t_en: I couldn't even find a complete list of contestants, and I didn't see Igor's name anywhere.

t_ch: 没关系，就算旧的传奇已经不为人知，我还是可以创造出新的传奇！
t_en: It's okay. Even though this ancient legend is no longer known, I can still create a new legend myself!

t_ch: 我会在演武仪典的擂台上，用我的拳头，重新书写伊戈尔的故事。
t_en: With my fists, I'll rewrite Igor's story in the Wardance's ring.

t_ch: 请你们等着瞧吧！
t_en: Just you wait and see!

t_ch: 嗯！我们翘首以盼！
t_en: Yeah! We look forward to it!

t_ch: 期待。
t_en: Can't wait!

t_ch: 伊戈尔的事情暂时告一段落了。我们回休息室准备接下来的叩关赛吧。
t_en: I guess that's all there is about Igor for now. Let's head back to the lounge to prepare for the upcoming knockout stage.

t_ch: 说不定青雀其实认识伊戈尔，只是忘记了。
t_en: Maybe Qingque actually knew Igor, but forgot about him.

t_ch: 我还没有那么老啦！
t_en: I'm not that old!

t_ch: 也可能你只是忘记了自己的年龄。
t_en: Or maybe you've just forgotten your age.

t_ch: 你两句话就把我诊断为魔阴身了，太可怕了！
t_en: You're making me sound like I'm mara-struck. That's scary!

t_ch: 打完这场比赛，我就要登上「竞锋守擂」的擂台，对阵彦卿了。
t_en: After this match, I'll be up against Yanqing in the "Ringmaster's Challenge."

t_ch: 我以为自己会很紧张，但我现在一点都不紧张！也不是不紧张…该怎么形容呢？冷静到异乎寻常！
t_en: I thought I'd be really nervous, but I don't have the jitters at all! To say I'm not nervous at all isn't accurate... How should I put it? I'm unusually calm!

t_ch: 我理解！当年我参加星际和平娱乐第七十五轮面试的时候，也是这个感受！
t_en: I get you! I felt the same way for my seventy-fifth round of interviews with Interastral Peace Entertainment!

t_ch: 七十五轮…你看，幸亏我们没并入公司体系，现在才不用受这个罪。
t_en: Seventy-five rounds... See? It's fortunate we didn't join the IPC system, now we don't have to endure this misery.

t_ch: 不谈这个了…来看看下场比赛的对手是谁吧！
t_en: Let's not dwell on that... How about we check out your next opponent?

t_ch: 下场比赛这个「铁臂」是谁？
t_en: Who's this contestant with an iron arm?

t_ch: 「独立参赛者•铁臂」？怎么搞的神秘兮兮的……
t_en: "Independent Contestant: Iron Arm"? Why so mysterious...

t_ch: 终于有我不认识的参赛选手了！
t_en: Finally, there's a contestant I haven't met before!

t_ch: 话别说太满，搞不好等一会见了面，会发现又是你的老熟人！哈哈哈哈！
t_en: Don't be too sure about that. They might turn out to be another old friend of yours again! Hahahaha!

t_ch: 聊起公司负面就顾左右而言他！
t_en: You always change the subject whenever we mention anything negative about IPC!

t_ch: 我哪有！
t_en: That's not true!

t_ch: 哈哈，不要拷打卡美丽小姐了！还是看看我接下来的对手吧！
t_en: Haha, cut Miss Carmella some slack! Let's turn our attention to my next opponent!
